metadata.description: Voronoi diagram procedural - complex algorithm required

summary: Generates Voronoi patterns (cellular). Requires advanced procedural implementation. Very difficult to replicate exactly.
implementation: Requires Voronoi cell generation algorithm (complex shader math)
complexity: Very High - involves distance field calculations and cell identification
compatibility_loss_50_percent: Voronoi algorithm is non-trivial; approximations exist but don't match exactly
